script_text: Two tiny marks do big jobs in sentences.
Add an apostrophe and an S to show owning.
The dog's bone. The girl's book.
An apostrophe can also replace missing letters.
Can not becomes can't. Do not becomes don't.
Commas separate items in a list.
I like apples, bananas, and grapes!
Now you are ready to use apostrophes and commas!
